# Generated by exon. Do not edit manually.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.30)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPERIMENTAL_CXX_IMPORT_STD "451f2fe2-a8a2-47c3-bc32-94786d8fc91b")
set(CMAKE_CXX_MODULE_STD ON)
project(exon LANGUAGES CXX)

if(MSVC)
    add_compile_options(/W4 /wd4996 /utf-8)
    add_compile_definitions(_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)
endif()

function(exon_apply_msvc_test_silence target)
    if(NOT MSVC)
        return()
    endif()

    set(_exon_silence_src "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/_exon_test_silence_msvc.cpp")
    if(NOT EXISTS "${_exon_silence_src}")
        file(WRITE "${_exon_silence_src}" [=[
// Generated by exon. Do not edit manually.
// Suppresses MSVC CRT abort/error dialogs in test binaries so failures
// surface as exit codes instead of blocking the CLI.
#if defined(_WIN32) && defined(_MSC_VER)
extern "C" unsigned int __stdcall SetErrorMode(unsigned int);
extern "C" unsigned int _set_abort_behavior(unsigned int, unsigned int);

namespace {
struct exon_test_silence_t {
    exon_test_silence_t() noexcept {
        // SEM_FAILCRITICALERRORS | SEM_NOGPFAULTERRORBOX | SEM_NOOPENFILEERRORBOX
        SetErrorMode(0x0001u | 0x0002u | 0x8000u);
        // Drop _WRITE_ABORT_MSG (0x1) and _CALL_REPORTFAULT (0x4) so abort()
        // returns silently with no message box and no WER report.
        _set_abort_behavior(0u, 0x1u | 0x4u);
    }
};
exon_test_silence_t exon_test_silence_v;
} // namespace
#endif
]=])
    endif()

    target_sources(${target} PRIVATE "${_exon_silence_src}")
endfunction()

if(NOT DEFINED EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS)
    set(EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS ON)
endif()

include(FetchContent)
if(NOT TARGET cppx)
    FetchContent_Declare(cppx
        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/misut/cppx.git
        GIT_TAG v1.11.0
        GIT_SHALLOW ON
    )
    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(cppx)
endif()
if(NOT TARGET tomlcpp)
    FetchContent_Declare(tomlcpp
        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/misut/tomlcpp.git
        GIT_TAG v0.3.0
        GIT_SHALLOW ON
    )
    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(tomlcpp)
endif()

add_library(exon-modules)
target_sources(exon-modules
    PUBLIC FILE_SET CXX_MODULES BASE_DIRS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/build.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/build.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cli.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/commands.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/core.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/debug.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/debug.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/fetch.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/fetch.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/lock.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/lock.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/manifest.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/manifest.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/reporting.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/reporting.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/semver.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/templates.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/toolchain.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/toolchain.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/vcpkg.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/vcpkg.system.cppm
)
target_link_libraries(exon-modules PUBLIC
    cppx
    tomlcpp
)

add_executable(exon)
target_sources(exon PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/main.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(exon PRIVATE exon-modules)

set_source_files_properties(
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/build.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/build.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cli.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/commands.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/core.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/debug.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/debug.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/fetch.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/fetch.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/lock.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/lock.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/manifest.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/manifest.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/reporting.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/reporting.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/semver.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/templates.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/toolchain.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/toolchain.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/vcpkg.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/vcpkg.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/main.cpp
    PROPERTIES COMPILE_DEFINITIONS
    "EXON_PKG_NAME=\"exon\";EXON_PKG_VERSION=\"0.33.0\""
)

if(EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS)

add_executable(test-regressions)
target_sources(test-regressions PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/regressions.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-regressions PRIVATE
    exon-modules
)
exon_apply_msvc_test_silence(test-regressions)

add_executable(test-test_build)
target_sources(test-test_build PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_build.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_build PRIVATE
    exon-modules
)
exon_apply_msvc_test_silence(test-test_build)

add_executable(test-test_cli)
target_sources(test-test_cli PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_cli.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_cli PRIVATE
    exon-modules
)
exon_apply_msvc_test_silence(test-test_cli)

add_executable(test-test_commands)
target_sources(test-test_commands PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_commands.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_commands PRIVATE
    exon-modules
)
exon_apply_msvc_test_silence(test-test_commands)

add_executable(test-test_debug)
target_sources(test-test_debug PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_debug.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_debug PRIVATE
    exon-modules
)
exon_apply_msvc_test_silence(test-test_debug)

add_executable(test-test_fetch)
target_sources(test-test_fetch PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_fetch.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_fetch PRIVATE
    exon-modules
)
exon_apply_msvc_test_silence(test-test_fetch)

add_executable(test-test_lock)
target_sources(test-test_lock PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_lock.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_lock PRIVATE
    exon-modules
)
exon_apply_msvc_test_silence(test-test_lock)

add_executable(test-test_manifest)
target_sources(test-test_manifest PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_manifest.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_manifest PRIVATE
    exon-modules
)
exon_apply_msvc_test_silence(test-test_manifest)

add_executable(test-test_reporting)
target_sources(test-test_reporting PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_reporting.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_reporting PRIVATE
    exon-modules
)
exon_apply_msvc_test_silence(test-test_reporting)

add_executable(test-test_semver)
target_sources(test-test_semver PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_semver.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_semver PRIVATE
    exon-modules
)
exon_apply_msvc_test_silence(test-test_semver)

add_executable(test-test_toml)
target_sources(test-test_toml PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_toml.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_toml PRIVATE
    exon-modules
)
exon_apply_msvc_test_silence(test-test_toml)

add_executable(test-test_vcpkg)
target_sources(test-test_vcpkg PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_vcpkg.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_vcpkg PRIVATE
    exon-modules
)
exon_apply_msvc_test_silence(test-test_vcpkg)
endif()
